expected_properties: dout updates correctly for rapid address changes
additional_cases.goal: Test that successive address changes produce corresponding dout updates without intermediate glitches
stimulus_intent: Toggle addr through a sequence of values (e.g., 0x00, 0x01, 0x02)
timing_assumptions: Assume zero-time propagation, observe after each change

expected_properties: Repeated reads of same address yield identical dout
additional_cases.goal: Ensure deterministic output for same address across multiple reads
stimulus_intent: Read same address multiple times interleaved with other addresses

expected_properties: dout reflects memory content for given addr
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Confirm combinational read behavior of ROM
notes: No clock needed; behavior is purely combinational
stimulus_intent: Drive a single address value and monitor dout
timing_assumptions: Observe after stable addr, no fixed latency assumed

expected_properties: dout matches expected values at min and max address
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate ROM output at address extremes (0x00 and 0xFF)
notes: Edge values test memory initialization boundaries
